metadata.description: A collaborative app to create and share trip plans.

home.heroTitle: Planning is part of the adventure.
home.description: A collaborative app to create and share trip plans.

schedule.title: Schedule Management
schedule.description: Organize destinations by day. Drag and drop to reorder.

realtime.title: Real-time Collaboration
realtime.description: Changes by members are reflected in real time. See who's viewing what.

expense.title: Expense Tracking & Settlement
expense.description: Record expenses and auto-calculate splits. Track payment status with settlement checks.

poll.title: Polls
poll.description: Coordinate dates and gather opinions with quick polls. Share links so anyone can participate.

souvenir.title: Souvenir List
souvenir.description: Organize what to buy by recipient. Manage priorities and purchase status.

roulette.title: Roulette
roulette.description: Can't decide? Let the roulette choose. Add some fun to destination picking.

terms.article1Content: These Terms of Service ("Terms") set forth the conditions governing the use of sugara ("the Service"). By using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
terms.article2Item1: Users shall register an account with accurate information.
terms.article2Item2: Users are responsible for properly managing their account credentials.
terms.article2Item3: Transferring, lending, or sharing accounts with third parties is prohibited.
terms.article3Intro: Users shall not engage in any of the following activities while using the Service:
terms.article3Item3: Interfering with the operation of the Service, including placing excessive load
terms.article3Item4: Infringing upon the rights of other users or third parties
terms.article3Item5: Violating laws, regulations, or public order and morals
terms.article3Item6: Using information obtained through the Service for purposes outside the Service
terms.article3Item7: Any other activity deemed inappropriate by the operator
terms.article4Content: The operator may modify, suspend, or terminate the Service without prior notice. The operator shall not be liable for any damages incurred by users as a result.
terms.article5Item1: The Service is provided "as is" without warranty of completeness, accuracy, or fitness for a particular purpose.
terms.article5Item2: The operator does not guarantee the preservation of trip plans or other data created by users through the Service.
terms.article5Item3: The operator shall not be liable for damages caused by communication failures, system outages, or other disruptions that prevent use of the Service.
terms.article6Item1: Intellectual property rights related to the Service belong to the operator.
terms.article6Item2: Rights to content entered by users (such as trip plan data) belong to the respective users.
terms.article7Content: Users may delete their account from the settings page. Upon deletion, all trips created by the user (including those with other active members) and all associated data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
terms.article8Content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Japan.
terms.article9Content: The operator may amend these Terms as necessary. Amended Terms take effect upon publication on this page. Users will be notified within the Service of significant changes.

privacy.section1Content: sugara ("the Service") considers the protection of users' personal information to be of paramount importance. This Privacy Policy describes how personal information is handled by the Service.
privacy.section2Content: The Service is operated by an individual. For inquiries, please use the feedback feature within the Service.
privacy.section3Intro: The Service collects the following information:
privacy.section3Item1: Account information: username, display name, password (stored as a hash), email address (optional)
privacy.section3Item2: Trip plan data: trip titles, destinations, dates, schedules, memos, and other user-entered information
privacy.section3Item3: Access logs: IP address, User-Agent (collected for session management)
privacy.section3Item4: Activity history: operation logs for collaborative editing tracking
privacy.section3Item5: Feedback: user-submitted feedback content (stored in GitHub Issues)
privacy.section4Intro: Collected information is used for the following purposes:
privacy.section4Item1: Providing trip planning and sharing features
privacy.section4Item3: Sending password reset emails (for users who have set an email address)
privacy.section4Item4: Preventing unauthorized access and ensuring security
privacy.section4Item5: Improving the Service and developing new features
privacy.section5Intro: Personal information will not be provided to third parties without consent, except as required by law. However, data handling is entrusted to the following service providers for the operation of the Service:
privacy.section5Item1: Supabase, Inc. — Database and real-time communication
privacy.section5Item3: GitHub, Inc. — Storage of feedback information
privacy.section5Item4: Google LLC — Sending password reset and email verification emails (Gmail SMTP)
privacy.section6Content: The Service uses session cookies for authentication and session management. These cookies have httpOnly, Secure, and SameSite=Lax attributes and are used solely for maintaining authentication. No cookies are used for analytics or advertising purposes.
privacy.section7Content: Appropriate technical measures are in place to safeguard personal information, including password hashing and encrypted communication (SSL/TLS).
privacy.section8Content: Users may delete their account and associated data from the settings page. For other requests regarding disclosure, correction, or suspension of use, please contact us through the feedback feature.
privacy.section9Content: This Policy may be revised without prior notice in response to changes in laws or the Service. Revised policies take effect upon publication on this page. Users will be notified within the Service of significant changes.
privacy.section10Date3: Revised: March 3, 2026 (updated for email address collection)
